title: El último cuplé
writer: Antonio Mas Guindal, Jesús María de Arozamena
actors: Sara Montiel, Armando Calvo, Enrique Vera
plot: This is a musical drama featuring a tragic love story that relates a torch singer's rise to fame, and then her downfall because of her lover's death. She manages to return to the stage, but after only one public performance, she p...
